name: secondary_source_concept_id
description: Survey concept ID (stamped from the table via colmap)

name: current_source_question_concept_id
description: Grid / select-all parent concept ID; NULL if standalone question

name: loop_instance
description: Loop instance index (_N suffix); 1 if not looped

name: question_version
description: Question/concept revision tag e.g. _v2; NULL if none

name: response_value_as_string
description: Verbatim raw cell value — always populated (lossless source of truth)

name: response_value_as_number
description: Numeric answer (Num/Year/count); populated by downstream type step

name: response_value_as_concept_id
description: Coded answer concept ID (single/multi-select); populated by downstream type step

name: response_value_as_date
description: Date answer (ISO YYYY-MM-DD); populated by downstream type step for Special Functions questions

name: source_table
description: Fully qualified source table e.g. CleanConnect.module1

name: source_column
description: Source column name in the CleanConnect table
